title: Realistic Glass Plus
description: Makes glass (and more) rendering more realistic
body:
Makes glass (and copper grates + leaves) rendered more 3d, and makes glass panes (and iron bars) look more like blocks in inventory.

Requires Continuity to function as intended.
Maybe works with OptiFine, but I didn't test.

This pack changes no textures except copper grate to make it tileable, and was designed in a way which makes it very easy to modify or make addons for, so feel free to do so.

If you have seen this before and want to judge me, please read the section below:


<details>
<summary>Disclaimer</summary>

I got inspired to make this after I saw this video about Caelesti: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YBK1gzalNIM

After that I remembered about "Perfect glass pane" by XeKr, and "3D Glass Panes" by Mr Axolotl.
It gave me the idea to combine them all into one, and only after finishing it did I learn that Caelesti already does something similar...

But specifically because I didn't look at Caelesti did this pack turn out original enough to post, since I decided to solve all the issues, and make all files myself.

</details>

Btw, if you have VanillaTweaks "Visual Waxed Copper Items", put the pack above this one in the selection menu.
